---
name: Gap
about:
  A missing capability, coverage hole, or unimplemented requirement that leaves the system incomplete or inconsistent
  with its intended design
---

**Type:** gap

**Priority:** critical | high | medium | low

**Status:** pending | approved | in-progress | needs-more-info | implemented | wont-fix

**Created by:** <name>

**Claimed by:** none

**Skill:** <skill name> v<skill version>

**Component:** harness | claude | codex | gemini | ui | operator | charts | _(leave blank if cross-cutting or other)_

**Category:** functionality | coverage | consistency | integration | observability

**Confidence:** high | medium | low — <one sentence justification>

**File:** <file path and line number, or `n/a` if no existing file>

**Expected:** <what the system should do or have, based on design intent or requirements>

**Actual:** <what is currently missing, absent, or incomplete>

**Implementation:** <suggested approach to close the gap, or `unknown`>

**Depends on:**

- none

**Acceptance criteria:**

- [ ] Gap is closed or explicitly accepted with documented rationale
- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated (if applicable)
